Who I Am

I build AI systems that actually work in production — not demos. I've shipped MLOps pipelines processing 300M+ records, multi-agent GenAI platforms serving Fortune 100 clients, and NLP recommendation engines running inside banking apps. I care deeply about the craft.

Off the clock I'm a full-blown nerd — deep into science fiction, fantasy, and anime, with Brandon Sanderson's Stormlight Archive occupying a permanent corner of my brain. I speak 8 languages, stream games, chase good photographs, and when the weather's right I'm out on my longboard pretending I'm better at it than I am.
